title: Metadata not serialized correctly when sending files
symptom: When sending files through the embedded n8n chat, the metadata is not serialized correctly and appears as [object Object]. This prevents proper processing of the metadata in n8n.
not_this_if: Metadata is sent without file uploads
root_cause: The issue arises because the request header 'Content-Type' is set to 'application/json', which conflicts with file uploads. Additionally, the metadata needs to be manually converted to JSON for proper parsing by n8n.
fix_steps: Remove the 'Content-Type' header from the request.
Manually convert the metadata to JSON using JSON.stringify.
Add an intermediate set node in n8n to parse the metadata using JSON.parse.
agent_instruction: Remove the 'Content-Type' header and ensure metadata is serialized to JSON before sending.
